    <h1 {...{
      "id": "plugin-workflows"
    }}>{`Plugin workflows`}</h1>
    <p>{`Learn the recommended plugin development workflow for the Adobe UXP Developer Tool (UDT).`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "load-and-watch-a-plugin"
    }}>{`Load and Watch a plugin`}</h2>
    <p>{`Plugins added to the developer workspace do not automatically get added to their supported host application. Instead, when the host application is launched, you should manually tell UDT to load it. You have two options here:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Load`}</strong>{`: This will load the plugin in the host application.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Load & Watch`}</strong>{`: This will load the plugin in the host application `}<em parentName="li">{`and`}</em>{` will watch for changes in the plugin's source code. This is the recommended option.`}</li>
    </ul>

    <p>{`If you have selected the `}<strong parentName="p">{`Load & Watch`}</strong>{` option, you can also reload the plugin by clicking the `}<strong parentName="p">{`Reload`}</strong>{` button in the UDT window.`}</p>

    <p>{`Manifest changes`}</p>
    <p>{`Load & Watch automatically reloads the plugin when you make changes to the plugin's source code with the exception of manifest changes.               "boxShadow": "inset 0px 0px 0px 400px none",
              "top": "0",
              "left": "0"
            }
          }}></img>{`
        `}</picture>{`
    `}</span></p>
    <p>{`Once you're done with troubleshooting, you can close the debugger window.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "working-with-bundlers"
    }}>{`Working with Bundlers`}</h2>
    <p>{`When working with JavaScript frameworks like React JS, Vue, Svelte, or other bundlers like Webpack and Parcel, you'll need to understand how to effectively use them in combination with the UDT. There are various options available, depending on your workflow needs.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "add-to-the-udt-workspace"
    }}>{`Add to the UDT workspace`}</h3>
    <p>{`With bundlers, you'll typically have two `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`manifest.json`}</inlineCode>{` files. One will be in your plugin's source code directory, and the other will be in your plugin's distribution directory.`}</p>
    <p><span parentName="p" {...{
        "className": "gatsby-resp-image-wrapper",
        "style": {
          "position": "relative",
          "display": "block",
          "marginLeft": "auto",
          "marginRight": "auto",

        }
      }}>{`
      `}<span parentName="span" {...{
          "className": "gatsby-resp-image-background-image",
          "style": {
            "paddingBottom": "53.43750000000001%",
            "position": "relative",
            "bottom": "0",
            "left": "0",
            "display": "block",
            "transition": "opacity 0.5s 0.5s",
            "pointerEvents": "none"
          }
        }}></span>{`
  `}<picture parentName="span">{`
          `}<source parentName="picture" {...{
            "srcSet": ["/uxp-premiere-pro/static/8ffc47af1b36032d8c6ae642be78eaeb/5530d/plugin-workflows--manifests.webp 320w", "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/8ffc47af1b36032d8c6ae642be78eaeb/0c8fb/plugin-workflows--manifests.webp 640w", "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/8ffc47af1b36032d8c6ae642be78eaeb/94b1e/plugin-workflows--manifests.webp 1280w", "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/8ffc47af1b36032d8c6ae642be78eaeb/0b34d/plugin-workflows--manifests.webp 1920w", "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/8ffc47af1b36032d8c6ae642be78eaeb/f3963/plugin-workflows--manifests.webp 2500w"],
            "sizes": "(max-width: 1280px) 100vw, 1280px",
            "type": "image/webp"
          }}></source>{`
          `}<source parentName="picture" {...{
            "srcSet": ["/uxp-premiere-pro/static/8ffc47af1b36032d8c6ae642be78eaeb/dd4a7/plugin-workflows--manifests.png 320w", "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/8ffc47af1b36032d8c6ae642be78eaeb/0f09e/plugin-workflows--manifests.png 640w", "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/8ffc47af1b36032d8c6ae642be78eaeb/bbbf7/plugin-workflows--manifests.png 1280w", "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/8ffc47af1b36032d8c6ae642be78eaeb/ac7a9/plugin-workflows--manifests.png 1920w", "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/8ffc47af1b36032d8c6ae642be78eaeb/6482f/plugin-workflows--manifests.png 2500w"],
            "sizes": "(max-width: 1280px) 100vw, 1280px",

            "src": "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/8ffc47af1b36032d8c6ae642be78eaeb/bbbf7/plugin-workflows--manifests.png",
            "alt": "UDT - Manifest files",
            "title": "UDT - Manifest files",
            "loading": "lazy",
            "style": {
              "width": "100%",
              "height": "100%",
              "margin": "0",
              "verticalAlign": "middle",
              "position": "absolute",
              "opacity": "0",
              "transition": "opacity 0.5s",
              "color": "inherit",
              "boxShadow": "inset 0px 0px 0px 400px none",

            }
          }}></img>{`
        `}</picture>{`
    `}</span></p>
    <p>{`You can load either one of these, but you need to be aware of the differences.`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Adding a plugin using the `}<strong parentName="li">{`distribution`}</strong>{` `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`manifest.json`}</inlineCode>{` means that you're loading the entire project from the distribution folder. If your plugin build steps involve removing and recreating that folder folder, or cleaning all the files it contains, your plugin `}<em parentName="li">{`may not`}</em>{` reload correctly in the UDT.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Adding a plugin using the `}<strong parentName="li">{`source`}</strong>{` `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`manifest.json`}</inlineCode>{` is the preferred option, but you'll also need to edit the plugin's options as follows.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`In UDT, open the plugin's `}<strong parentName="p">{`••• > Options...`}</strong>{` menu, select `}<strong parentName="p">{`Advanced`}</strong>{`, and enter the relative path (from the selected source `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`manifest.json`}</inlineCode>{` file) to your plugin’s distribution folder. This loads the plugin the same way as in the previous step, but ensures that any build processes which remove or recreate the distribution folder won’t affect the plugin’s ability to reload in the Developer Tool.`}</p>

        }

      `}<span parentName="span" {...{

          "style": {
            "paddingBottom": "54.37499999999999%",
            "position": "relative",
            "bottom": "0",
            "left": "0",
            "display": "block",
            "transition": "opacity 0.5s 0.5s",
            "pointerEvents": "none"
          }
        }}></span>{`
  `}<picture parentName="span">{`
          `}<source parentName="picture" {...{
            "srcSet": ["/uxp-premiere-pro/static/13210b4c149fe13110e39e1d45430ff2/5530d/plugin-workflows--dist-folder.webp 320w", "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/13210b4c149fe13110e39e1d45430ff2/0c8fb/plugin-workflows--dist-folder.webp 640w", "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/13210b4c149fe13110e39e1d45430ff2/94b1e/plugin-workflows--dist-folder.webp 1280w", "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/13210b4c149fe13110e39e1d45430ff2/0b34d/plugin-workflows--dist-folder.webp 1920w", "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/13210b4c149fe13110e39e1d45430ff2/f3963/plugin-workflows--dist-folder.webp 2500w"],

    <InlineAlert slots="text" variant="info" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`When using a bundler or framework, `}<strong parentName="p">{`make sure to install its dependencies`}</strong>{` by running `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`npm install`}</inlineCode>{` or `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`yarn install`}</inlineCode>{`. The UDT does not automatically install dependencies for you.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "watch-for-changes"
    }}>{`Watch for changes`}</h3>
    <p>{`Most bundler-based projects include a dedicated build process that watches your code for changes. The UDT isn’t aware of these build steps, so if you want it to reload the plugin automatically when updates occur, you’ll need to:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Run your plugin’s `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`watch`}</inlineCode>{` build process in a terminal`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`In the Developer Tool, select `}<strong parentName="li">{`Load & Watch`}</strong>{` for the desired plugin`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`This way, when your `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`watch`}</inlineCode>{` process detects a change and rebuilds the plugin, the UDT will recognize the updated build and automatically reload the plugin in the host environment.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "package-your-plugin-for-distribution"
    }}>{`Package your plugin for distribution`}</h2>
    <p>{`The UDT provides a convenient way to package your plugin into a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`.ccx`}</inlineCode>{` installer file, ready to be shared in the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../plugins/distribution/adobe-marketplace/index.md"
      }}>{`Adobe Creative Cloud Marketplace`}</a>{` or any other distribution channel of your choice. Please refer to the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../../plugins/distribution/overview/index.md"
      }}>{`Share & Distribute Guide`}</a>{` for a thorough description of the subject.`}</p>

    </MDXLayout>;
}
